strategy: Personas hold goals and guardrails. Workflow prompts orchestrate only. Skills hold domain depth. Registry + adr-blueprint hold defaults. Adapter references hold stack patterns. Tune skills/references per stack — never IR schema or generic skills.

technology-context.label: Technology Context Builder
technology-context.primaryGoal: Bootstrap config and write valid technology_context.json; never block on missing ADR.
bestPractices: Try skill-package read first; curl raw GitHub URLs if bundled JSON not visible
Never write error-only technology_context without attempting curl fallback
Fuzzy-match stack aliases before falling back to category default
Copy layerMapping, artifacts, references from registry profile verbatim

core-ir.label: Core Design Model
core-ir.primaryGoal: Synthesize requirements if needed, then produce complete generic IR with DDD bounded contexts.
bestPractices: boundedContexts[] mandatory with aggregates, entities, valueObjects, domainEvents
Map every capability and dataEntity to a bounded context
Never emit stack-specific terms in IR

technology-adapter.label: Technology Adapter
technology-adapter.primaryGoal: Map IR to stack artifacts; abort if technology_context invalid.
bestPractices: If technology_context.error: re-bootstrap registry via curl before adapting
Load references via skills tool or curl fallback
Java: full DDD Domain layer; React: PresentationStyle; MuleSoft: API-led + error handlers

design-deliverable.label: Design Deliverable
design-deliverable.primaryGoal: Two self-contained stakeholder files; report adapterStatus honestly.
bestPractices: Include DDD domain model section from IR and Domain/ artifacts
Include presentation style section for frontend profiles

validation.label: Validation Design
validation.primaryGoal: JSON quality gate; CRITICAL on missing stack adaptation.
criticalChecks: profile artifacts exist for resolved profileId
IR boundedContexts non-empty for backend profiles
meta.adapterStatus not missing when profile resolved
consolidated deliverables include DDD section when boundedContexts in IR
bestPractices: CRITICAL if deliverables missing — not if ADR was synthesized
CRITICAL if adapter artifacts missing for resolved stack
